steps.t: Coruwen has asked you to travel to Cobshollow to the south of Lintrev to collect samples of corrupted plant life.
Coruwen awaits your return with the plant samples in Lintrev
Coruwen has asked you to grind the corrupted samples into a powder. Coruwen's mortar and pestle can be found nearby, next to her work table in Lintrev…
Coruwen instructs you on how to mix the ingredients in the mixing bowl by her work table in Lintrev.
Coruwen has asked you to mix the samples in with the ingredients she has prepared. The mixing bowl can be found near Coruwen in Lintrev.
The cleansing draught seems to be complete. Bring it to Coruwen in Lintrev.
Coruwen has asked you to spread the cleansing draught along a running water source. She has suggested a waterfall to the south of Lintrev that runs in…
The cleansing solution has been poured into a water source that runs into the Wadewater. This should help with the shadow's corruption for now. Coruwe…
